plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i 's/ \* Version:.*/ * Version:           ${nextRelease.version}/' wp-ai-mind.php && sed -i "s/define( 'WP_AI_MIND_VERSION', '[^']*' )/define( 'WP_AI_MIND_VERSION', '${nextRelease.version}' )/" wp-ai-mind.php && sed -i 's/^Stable tag:.*/Stable tag: ${nextRelease.version}/' readme.txt && mkdir -p dist && REPO_DIR=$(pwd) && PLUGIN_TMP=$(mktemp -d) && mkdir -p "$PLUGIN_TMP/wp-ai-mind" && cp wp-ai-mind.php uninstall.php readme.txt "$PLUGIN_TMP/wp-ai-mind/" && cp -r assets includes languages vendor "$PLUGIN_TMP/wp-ai-mind/" && (cd "$PLUGIN_TMP" && zip -r "$REPO_DIR/dist/wp-ai-mind-${nextRelease.version}.zip" wp-ai-mind/) && rm -rf "$PLUGIN_TMP"
